description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the php:7.3 Docker image as the default and runs a before_script that updates apt, installs wget git zip unzip, installs Composer via curl, installs xdebug-beta via pecl and enables it, then runs php composer.phar install. Define three test jobs in the default test stage: test:php7.1, test:php7.2, and test:php7.3, each overriding the image to php:7.1, php:7.2, and php:7.3 respectively, and each executing the command vendor/bin/phpunit --configuration phpunit.xml --coverage-text --colors=never. Ensure each job does not allow failure and runs the PHPUnit command with coverage text output and no colors. No caches, artifacts, services, or special rules are defined.
